Notes: Square blank; extra 0.5 in at each end for endgrain waste and setup. Finished OD = bore + 2×wall = 0.866 + 0.472 = 1.338 in. Turn round after boring.
Required: bore scrap BEFORE tonewood. Same cross-section. Measure bore wander and concentricity before drilling walnut.
Only for Bei Xiao / Qin Xiao. Cap is turned to fit over bore end and shaped to U-notch profile.
Turned or cut to fit bore ID at foot. Taper optional for adjustable tuning.

Description: YIELD NOTES: Square blanks ripped from 8/4 lumber (min 2 in thickness). Allow one scrap blank for bore validation. Estimated waste ≤ 15%.
